subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 06/26] server41tests: test remove triggers dir delegation recall

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds a test case to the server41tests suite, which verifies that removing a file from one client triggers a delegation recall on another client. The test creates a directory delegation without notification, opens a file in it, and then removes the file from a second client. It checks that the server issues a CB_RECALL in response.
